channel.title: photoshop on Technical Writing Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in photoshop on Technical Writing Portfolio
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2008–2019, Steve Francia and the Hugo Authors; all rights reserved.

item.title: Help File
item.description: The DXP Series help file is a web-based help file integrated into software. It includes context-sensitive links to relevant topics. My responsibilities were to create a single-source CSS file for multiple output types and collaborate with Research and Development to generate the help file within software sprint cycles. An actual copy of the help file is readily not available. Programs used: Madcap Flare Adobe Dreamweaver Adobe Photoshop The actual help file is not available for general public consumption, but the following screenshot shows the layout, styles, structure, and writing conventions used.

item.title: User Guide
item.description: The IN1606 and IN1608 Series user guide is a document provided online by the company to provide extensive configuration and operation information to users. It is normally provided in PDF format. My responsibilities were to work with collaborate with Research and Development (Product Development) and technical illustrators to generate text and images for a technical US audience. I wrote the text, organized the topics, and captured user interface examples through parsing engineering documents and using the device.

item.title: Setup Guide
item.description: The XTP T FB 202 setup guide is a printed document provided to the customer with the device. The setup guide instructs installers only on how to fit the device into several common floor boxes. It is normally printed on a single sheet of paper, folded in half. My responsibilities were to work with collaborate with Research and Development (Product Development) and technical illustrators to generate text and images for a technical US audience.
